rationale: Educ. Code §29.313 governs evaluation of deaf and hard of hearing student services. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax, or appraised value, so the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change does not affect it.
quote: Each school district must provide continuous evaluation of the effectiveness of the district's services for students who are deaf or hard of hearing.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's subject matter.
